headline: Hubbbell Inc (NYSE:HUBB): A Quality Dividend Stock with Strong Fundamentals and Sustainable Payouts
summary: Hubbbell Inc (HUBB) offers a sustainable 1.18% dividend with strong growth and safety. With excellent profitability (9/10) and solid financial health (7/10), it’s a quality pick for income investors.
